title: Hypixel Zombies 2D
description: It adds textures for weapons, skills and powerups for Hypixel's Zombies gamemode.
body:
As you can probably guess from the title, this is a texture pack for Hypixel's Zombies gamemode.

It adds textures for weapons, skills and powerups which should hopefully fit the vanilla artstyle.

No, it doesn't make the game bloodier or anything. It's still mostly the same.

Enemies remain untouched.

![All weapons, power-ups and upgrades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Z6kKKkBH/images/ba44aa743f5f77852bad22af4d979b4f188ebbc4.png)
